title: Julie Buffalohead: Stories of Becoming
description: The stories adapted from European folktales often feature a desire for riches, status, and romance. In comparison, Indigenous stories highlight relations to other beings. In accordance with the Indigenous imperative to see the land, animals, and other living beings represented, Julie Buffalohead’s…

title: Special Installation: Trespassers Beware! Fort Conley and Wyandot Women Warriors
